example: Upgrading a boiler in Kilburn is often a game of 'Tetris.' Space is at a premium, whether you’re in a studio near the station or a family home in Brondesbury. We specialise in swapping out those massive, ancient water tanks for sleek, high-efficiency combi boilers that fit perfectly into those narrow London kitchen cupboards, giving you back your storage space and lowering those eye-watering energy bills
